summary: Iteration 26: Tested all 4 P1 Challenge features. All tests PASSED (8 backend + UI verification). Features: (1) Check-in goal buttons 1x-5x/sem in form, (2) Training-based weekly progression, (3) Participant cells with green checkmarks/blue numbers, (4) Fire emoji for challenge members.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P1 Challenge features are working correctly. Backend enriches challenge participants with week1_trainings through week6_trainings from weekly_trainings collection. Frontend displays training-based completion stats.

feature_1_checkin_goal_buttons.description: Check-in goal buttons (1x-5x/sem) display in challenge form with selected state highlighted in blue

evidence.description_text: Les participants doivent venir Nx par semaine pendant 6 semaines

feature_2_training_based_progression.description: Weekly progression shows training-based data from Saisie Séances with non-zero values

feature_3_participant_cells.description: Participant weekly cells show green checkmarks when trainings >= goal, blue numbers for in-progress

feature_4_fire_emoji_challenge_members.description: Members list shows 🔥 emoji next to members with 'challenge' in membership type

feature_5_checkin_detail_modal.description: Check-in detail modal shows training data per week with 'via Saisie Séances' label

evidence.training_source_text: données issues de la Saisie Séances

feature_6_bilans_suivis_clickable_cards.description: Bilans/Suivis stat cards are clickable with active filter states

feature_7_dashboard_kpis.description: Dashboard KPI cards display correctly with financial metrics
